## Meeting Purpose

[Demonstrate GrowthX's AI-driven content creation platform to causaLens for potential partnership in 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers a comprehensive content strategy and creation service, targeting 5 articles/week with potential for more](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [The platform uses AI workflows, expert oversight, and fact-checking to ensure high-quality, SEO-optimized content](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [causaLens is interested but considering for 2026 budget; CEO-to-CEO call and impact-focused case studies requested](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Platform Overview

  - [Strategy sprint develops rich artifacts for context](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [12-month execution phase with daily content creation](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [Platform manages content creation through Airtable-based Content OS](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [AI-driven workflows for research, drafting, and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [Ability to create custom pipelines for editorial and programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Ingests company resources (sales decks, transcripts, ICP documentation) for context](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Creates topic clusters and assignments based on research and SEO analysis](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [Uses agentic loops for deep research and quality evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
  - [Implements fact-checking process to ensure accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [Generates SEO meta tags and imagery (cover images, infographics)](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)

### Analytics and Reporting

  - [Sets up Looker dashboard for detailed content performance analysis](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Implements Scrunch dashboard for tracking LLM visibility and prompt performance](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
  - [Connects to GA4 and GSC for comprehensive analytics](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
  - [Weekly review cadence to track content performance and conversion impact](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)

### causaLens Specific Considerations

  - [Currently focused on pharma industry, but may expand/change ICP](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Limited marketing team (2-3 people) with George as primary contact](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [Interested in traditional SEO approaches (anchor blogs, listicles, comparisons)](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Considering editorial content focus with potential for future programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=1558.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to send case studies and impact-focused examples to George](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
  - [George to discuss potential partnership in upcoming team meeting](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
  - [causaLens to consider CEO-to-CEO call for further discussions](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
  - [Follow-up expected next week regarding causaLens' interest and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
  - [Potential January start date if partnership moves forward for 2026 budget](https://fathom.video/share/aRusTszLRN1Z_yztfUWSDdhRz_syW93U?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
